zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci是Robert de Buci和Judith的女兒，於從1079年1月7日到1080年1月6日出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特。她於1098年與Ralph Basset在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1154年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci是Robert de Buci和Judith的女儿，于从1079年1月7日到1080年1月6日出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特。她于1098年与Ralph Basset在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1154年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Buci
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (northern): patronymic or plural form of a medieval personal name Buso, but in some case it may be a nickname from the dialect word buso ‘hole’ and as adjective ‘empty, shallow’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci was born from 7 January 1079 to 6 January 1080, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert de Buci and Judith. She married Ralph Basset in 1098, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died about 1154, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci est née du 7 janvier 1079 au 6 janvier 1080, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert de Buci et Judith. Elle a épousé Ralph Basset en 1098, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1154, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci wurde von 7. Januar 1079 bis 6. Januar 1080 in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert de Buci und Judith geboren. Sie hat 1098 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb um 1154 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci è nata il da 7 gennaio 1079 a 6 gennaio 1080 nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert de Buci e Judith. Lei sposato Ralph Basset nel 1098, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1154, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Buciはから1079年1月7日まで1080年1月6日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトでRobert de BuciとJudithの娘として生まれた。1098年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでRalph Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1154年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットスト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staf: 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci(은)는 1079년 1월 7일부터 1080년 1월 6일까지 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 Robert de Buci(와)과 Judith의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Ralph Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci nasceu de 7 de janeiro de 1079 a 6 de janeiro de 1080, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Robert de Buci e Judith. Ela casou-se com Ralph Basset em 1098, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1154, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staf: ст питир'с чурч, дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci родилась с 7 января 1079 по 6 января 1080 в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Robert de Buci и Judith. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Basset в 1098 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла около 1154 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Alice de Buci nació desde 7 de enero de 1079 hasta 6 de enero de 1080, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Robert de Buci y Judith. Se casó con Ralph Basset en 1098, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1154, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en St Peter's Church, Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
